id.description: Filter using **one** of the following operators: `eq`, `oeq`

eq.description: The field exactly matches the provided value.

oeq.description: The field matches any of the provided values.

name.description: Filter using **one** of the following operators: `eq`, `neq`, `contains`

eq.description: The field exactly matches the provided value.

contains.description: The field contains the provided value.

neq.description: The field does not match the provided value.

cluster_type.description: Filter using **one** of the following operators: `eq`, `oeq`, `neq`

eq.description: The field exactly matches the provided value.

neq.description: The field does not match the provided value.

oeq.description: The field matches any of the provided values.
